creator: tundra@tundraware.com
text:
Upgrade of the sysutils/tdir port to latest version.

You guys asked me to send you diffs when I got around to this,
but I was not sure how you wanted them packaged up and annotated,
so I've attached my best guess of what you want in the fix area
below.  If I did it wrong, please let me know.

Fix: 

Diffs between new port (1.66) and current port (1.62):

Makefile

2c2
< # Date Created:               21 July 2001
---
> # Date Created:               03 July 2001
8c8
< PORTVERSION=  1.66
---
> PORTVERSION=  1.62


distinfo

1c1
< MD5 (tdir-1.66.tar.gz) = e08f7a1c05df639e2a0f04d4861b83da
---
> MD5 (tdir-1.62.tar.gz) = 3ba2dcff43d738f76d5c3e5c970d350c


pkg-comment

1c1
< Advanced file directory display utility
---
> Display directories with files ordered by ending "extension".
